name: InLeague Guinea Pig Cage Bottom Cover Parts for Dwarf Bunnies Squirrel Hamsters Black (64039193IL)
description: Description:Pets Cage Bottom Cover - good for rabbits, guinea pigs, hamsters other small pets.High Quality Material - Durable, leak proof, and hand washable PVC lined canvas bottom allows for easy maintenance.With Paste Straps - to attach washable bottom cover to pets cage bottom in vary locations to ensure a strong fit.Easy to Clean - Easy to use, washable and easy to disassemble.Note - Please measure the size of the guinea pig cage before purchasing to ensure that this product fits your cage.Specification:Material: 600DPVC Waterproof Oxford ClothSize: 119x61x9.5cm/46.85x24.02x3.74inchPackage
